item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
config = json.loads((root / 'config/onboarding.json').read_text())
doc = (root / 'docs/onboarding.md').read_text()
prose = next(line for line in doc.splitlines() if line.startswith('Run '))
checks = {
    'mode': f'Run {config[\"mode\"]} onboarding' in prose,
    'owner': f'for the {config[\"owner\"]} owner' in prose,
    'max_parallel': 'up to three jobs in parallel' in prose and config['max_parallel'] == 3,
    'queue_order': f'"'`{config["queues"][0]}` queue before `{config["queues"][1]}`'"' in prose,
}
print(prose)
for name, passed in checks.items():
    print(f'{name}={\"PASS\" if passed else \"FAIL\"}')
assert all(checks.values())
print('RESULT=PASS')
PY"
